+                eprintln!("{}", buffer);
+            }
         }
 
         // kill it so we don't have dangling processess

 ### Credits
 
-py-spy is heavily inspired by [Julia Evans](https://github.com/jvns/) excellent work on [rbspy](http://github.com/rbspy/rbspy). In particular the code to generate the flamegraphs is taken directly from rbspy, and this project use several crates ([read-process-memory](https://github.com/luser/read-process-memory) and [proc-maps](#TODO)) that were spun off from rbspy.
+py-spy is heavily inspired by [Julia Evans](https://github.com/jvns/) excellent work on [rbspy](http://github.com/rbspy/rbspy). In particular the code to generate the flamegraphs is taken directly from rbspy, and this project use several crates ([read-process-memory](https://github.com/luser/read-process-memory) and [proc-maps](https://github.com/benfred/proc-maps)) that were spun off from rbspy.
diff --git a/src/python_spy.rs b/src/python_spy.rs
index 437f603..4ba6713 100644
--- a/src/python_spy.rs
+++ b/src/python_spy.rs
@@ -412,7 +412,7 @@ impl PythonProcessInfo {
 #[cfg(windows)]
 use std::collections::HashMap;
 #[cfg(windows)]
-pub fn get_windows_python_symbols(pid: Pid, filename: &str, base_addr: u64) -> std::io::Result<HashMap<String, u64>> {
+pub fn get_windows_python_symbols(pid: Pid, filename: &str, offset: u64) -> std::io::Result<HashMap<String, u64>> {
     use proc_maps::win_maps::SymbolLoader;
 
     let handler = SymbolLoader::new(pid)?;
@@ -425,7 +425,10 @@ pub fn get_windows_python_symbols(pid: Pid, filename: &str, base_addr: u64) -> s
     // do for goblin, just load the the couple we need directly.
     for symbol in ["_PyThreadState_Current", "interp_head", "_PyRuntime"].iter() {
         if let Ok((base, addr)) = handler.address_from_name(symbol) {
-            ret.insert(String::from(*symbol), base_addr + addr  - base as u64);
+            // If we have a module base (ie from PDB), need to adjust by the offset
+            // otherwise seems like we can take address directly
+            let addr = if base == 0 { addr } else { offset + addr - base };
+            ret.insert(String::from(*symbol), addr);
         }
     }

author: Ben Frederickson
message: Retry more times when starting python process
patch:
commit 6f7ef2c4745bd3b9b76c14f8dbce4c39bdf390ad
Author: Ben Frederickson <github@benfrederickson.com>
Date:   Sun Aug 5 17:00:55 2018 -0700

    Retry more times when starting python process
    
    When running python (particularly under pyenv), it can take more than 30ms for the
    python interpreter to be available. This was causing errors like 'Failed to
    find Python binary'. Fix by waiting longer and trying more times.
---
 Cargo.lock        | 6 +++---
 src/main.rs       | 2 +-
 src/python_spy.rs | 2 +-
 3 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/Cargo.lock b/Cargo.lock
index 8ff5381..2a6623d 100644
--- a/Cargo.lock
+++ b/Cargo.lock
@@ -301,7 +301,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "py-spy"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "clap 2.32.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "console 0.6.1 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
@@ -310,7 +310,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "indicatif 0.9.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "libc 0.2.42 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "proc-maps 0.1.0 (git+https://github.com/benfred/proc-maps.git)",
- "python-bindings 0.1.0",
+ "python-bindings 0.1.1",
  "read-process-memory 0.1.3-pre (git+https://github.com/benfred/read-process-memory.git)",
  "regex 1.0.2 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "tempdir 0.3.7 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
@@ -320,7 +320,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "python-bindings"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "quote"
diff --git a/src/main.rs b/src/main.rs
index d70cafd..68a62b4 100644
--- a/src/main.rs
+++ b/src/main.rs
@@ -210,7 +210,7 @@ fn pyspy_main() -> Result<(), Error> {
             // sleep just in case: https://jvns.ca/blog/2018/01/28/mac-freeze/
             std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(50));
         }
-        let result = match PythonSpy::retry_new(command.id(), 3) {
+        let result = match PythonSpy::retry_new(command.id(), 8) {
             Ok(process) => {
                 if let Some(flame_file) = matches.value_of("flame") {
                     sample_flame(&process, flame_file)
diff --git a/src/python_spy.rs b/src/python_spy.rs
index ed4c796..1f4168d 100644
--- a/src/python_spy.rs
+++ b/src/python_spy.rs
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ impl PythonSpy {
             }
             // TODO: logging
             // println!("Failed to connect to process, retrying. Error: {}", err);
-            std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(10));
+            std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(20));
         }
     }

author: Ben Frederickson
message: turn back on automatic uploading of OSX wheels
patch:
commit da495d00f9a8d9467e7e9d374f03e4c8d8f88a37
Author: Ben Frederickson <github@benfrederickson.com>
Date:   Wed Aug 1 13:50:20 2018 -0700

    turn back on automatic uploading of OSX wheels
---
 .travis.yml | 7 ++++++-
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/.travis.yml b/.travis.yml
index 52c99b4..1955825 100644
--- a/.travis.yml
+++ b/.travis.yml
@@ -11,6 +11,11 @@ matrix:
 script:
   - $PIP install cibuildwheel setuptools_rust
   - export CIBW_BEFORE_BUILD='pip install setuptools-rust && source {project}/ci/install_rust.sh'
-  - export CIBW_SKIP='cp2* cp33-* cp34-* cp35-* $CIBW_SKIP'
+  - export CIBW_SKIP='cp33-* cp34-* $CIBW_SKIP'
   - export CIBW_ENVIRONMENT='PATH="$HOME/rust/bin:$PATH"'
   - cibuildwheel --output-dir wheelhouse
+  - |
+    if [[ $TRAVIS_TAG ]]; then
+      $PIP install twine
+      $PYTHON -m twine upload wheelhouse/*.whl
+    fi

author: Ben Frederickson
patch:
commit 2b4844ae88ffd5502100e8fab4594056db719f49
Author: Ben Frederickson <github@benfrederickson.com>
Date:   Tue Jul 31 19:53:28 2018 -0700

    add CI scripts
---
 .travis.yml        | 40 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 appveyor.yml       | 38 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 ci/install_rust.sh |  5 +++++
 3 files changed, 83 insertions(+)

diff --git a/.travis.yml b/.travis.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1fe7404
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.travis.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+language: python
+
+matrix:
+  include:
+    - sudo: required
+      services:
+        - docker
+      env:
+        - CIBW_SKIP=*manylinux1_i686*
+        - PIP=pip
+        - PYTHON=python
+    - sudo: required
+      services:
+        - docker
+      env:
+        - CIBW_SKIP=*manylinux1_x86_64*
+        - PIP=pip
+        - PYTHON=python
+    - os: osx
+      language: generic
+      env:
+        - PIP=pip2
+        - PYTHON=python2
+
+env:
+  global:
+    - TWINE_USERNAME=benfred
+      # Note: TWINE_PASSWORD is set in Travis settings
+
+script:
+  - $PIP install cibuildwheel setuptools_rust
+  - export CIBW_BEFORE_BUILD='pip install setuptools-rust && source {project}/ci/install_rust.sh'
+  - export CIBW_SKIP=cp34-*\ $CIBW_SKIP
+  - export CIBW_ENVIRONMENT='PATH="$HOME/rust/bin:$PATH"'
+  - cibuildwheel --output-dir wheelhouse
+  - |
+    if [[ $TRAVIS_TAG ]]; then
+      $PIP install twine
+      $PYTHON -m twine upload wheelhouse/*.whl
+    fi
diff --git a/appveyor.yml b/appveyor.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1f7e810
--- /dev/null
+++ b/appveyor.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+environment:
+  TWINE_USERNAME: benfred
+  # Note: TWINE_PASSWORD is set in Appveyor settings
+  matrix:
+    # Nightly 64-bit MSVC
+    - channel: stable
+      target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+      CIBW_SKIP: "*win32* cp27-* cp33-* cp34-*"
+      CIBW_BEFORE_BUILD: pip install setuptools-rust
+    # Nightly 32-bit MSVC
+    - channel: stable
+      target: i686-pc-windows-msvc
+      CIBW_SKIP: "*win_amd64* cp33-* cp34-*"
+      CIBW_BEFORE_BUILD: pip install setuptools-rust
+
+
+# from: https://github.com/starkat99/appveyor-rust/blob/master/appveyor.yml
+install:
+  - appveyor DownloadFile https://win.rustup.rs/ -FileName rustup-init.exe
+  - rustup-init -yv --default-toolchain stable --default-host %target%
+  - set PATH=%PATH%;%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin
+  - rustc -vV
+  - cargo -vV
+  - pip install cibuildwheel==0.9.1 setuptools_rust
+
+build_script:
+  - cibuildwheel --output-dir wheelhouse
+  - >
+    IF "%APPVEYOR_REPO_TAG%" == "true"
+    (
+    python -m pip install twine
+    &&
+    python -m twine upload wheelhouse/*.whl
+    )
+
+artifacts:
+  - path: "wheelhouse\\*.whl"
+    name: Wheels
diff --git a/ci/install_rust.sh b/ci/install_rust.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..050a1a4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ci/install_rust.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+if [ ! -d ~/rust-installer ]; then 
+    mkdir ~/rust-installer
+    curl -sL https://static.rust-lang.org/rustup.sh -o ~/rust-installer/rustup.sh
+    sh ~/rust-installer/rustup.sh --prefix=~/rust --spec=stable --disable-sudo -y 
+fi
